Bug / Task Description: A recent change regressed the retry-backoff policy used by the workflow engine (internal/engine/retry.go). Two problems are now visible: retries wait noticeably longer than configured — the very first retry already applies the backoff multiplier instead of waiting the base interval, and every subsequent delay is inflated by the same extra factor — and a failing workflow or activity is retried one more time than its MaxAttempts setting should permit. Fix NextRetry so the backoff schedule and the attempt limit match what the RetryPolicy fields describe (initial interval, backoff coefficient, max interval cap, and maximum attempts). Add a hidden test under internal/engine/ that locks in the corrected schedule and attempt limit.
Commit Subject: fix(engine): correct retry backoff schedule and MaxAttempts limit
